settings.title: Settings
settings.selectRuntime: Select the runtime environment that best fits your hardware. Chris AI dynamically manages resources to ensure optimal inference speeds.

webllm.name: Web-LLM
webllm.description: Native WebGPU acceleration for high-performance neural inference directly in the browser.

transformers.name: Transformers.js v3
transformers.description: ONNX/WASM runtime for Gemma 3, SmolLM2, Qwen 2.5 and more. Runs entirely locally in the browser.

settings.modelsSubtitle: Library of weights compatible with your current engine.
settings.webgpuDescription: Web-LLM utilizes the emerging WebGPU API++, which allows the interface to bypass standard browser overhead and communicate directly with your device's graphics card. This results in up to 10x faster token generation compared to traditional WASM implementations.
settings.localPrivacyDescription: All data remains on your machine. Both engines execute entirely within your browser's sandbox environment, ensuring that your prompts and private model weights remain strictly local to your hardware.
settings.appSettingsDescription: Manage your application data and preferences
settings.deleteAllDataDescription: Remove all locally stored data including chat history, settings, and downloaded models. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAllDataSuccess: ✅ All data deleted successfully! The page will reload shortly...
settings.deleteModelsDescription: Remove all downloaded AI/LLM models to free up storage space. Models can be re-downloaded later.
settings.privacyDescription: Your data stays on your device. No information is sent to external servers.
settings.privacyContent: All computations are performed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted to any server. Your prompts and model weights remain strictly on your device.
settings.impressumContent: © 2026 Local LLM Chat. All rights reserved.
settings.librariesDescription: View the open-source libraries powering this application
settings.githubDescription: View the source code and contribute on GitHub
settings.confirmDeleteAllDataDesc: This will delete all locally stored data including chat history, settings, and downloaded models. This action cannot be undone.
settings.confirmDeleteModelsDesc: All downloaded AI/LLM models will be deleted. You can re-download them later.

chat.loadModelWarning: Please load an AI Model first by clicking the Models tab
chat.startConversation: Start a conversation with your AI assistant
chat.pleaseWait: Please wait while we set up your chat

models.selectRuntime: Select the runtime environment that best fits your hardware
models.modelsSubtitle: Library of weights compatible with your current engine.
models.vramWarningText: We recommend models with less than 2 GB VRAM for optimal compatibility. Support varies depending on the device and available RAM.

huggingfaceAuth.huggingfaceDescription: Provide a Hugging Face token to access private models and increase download limits.

modeDescriptions.expert: Detailed explanations with details and bullet points

chatSettings.temperatureHint: Lower values = more precise, higher values = more creative answers

privacy.line_1: This privacy policy is available in English and other languages.
privacy.line_2: For a different language, please simply change the language on your device.
privacy.line_4: Thank you for visiting our website/app. We take the protection of your data very seriously. In this statement, we inform you about how we handle data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA). Our application follows a privacy-by-design approach: The actual data processing takes place locally on your device.
privacy.line_6: The entity responsible for processing your data and the publisher of this app is:
privacy.line_12: If you have any questions or concerns regarding data protection, please feel free to contact us at christian.developer.app@gmail.com.
privacy.line_15: This app stores data exclusively locally on your device. We use technologies such as IndexedDB and LocalStorage for this purpose.
privacy.line_16: The following information is stored locally:
privacy.line_17:
- The selected display language
- The app's technical log level (for troubleshooting)

This data remains on your device and is not transferred to our servers. You can completely delete all locally stored data at any time within the app under 'Info' using the 'Delete all data' button.
privacy.line_19: This app uses the NPM package mlc-ai to provide AI functions. When starting the app or using certain functions, the app downloads necessary AI model parameters from external repositories (e.g., Hugging Face or GitHub) on the internet.
privacy.line_20: A connection to these platforms is briefly established, and for technical reasons, your IP address is transmitted to the respective provider. However, the actual calculation of the AI ​​responses (inference) takes place **locally on your device**. No text or private content you enter is sent to external servers or to us for analysis.
privacy.line_25: We do not sell any of your data. Since we do not store any data centrally, your personal information is not shared with advertising networks or other third parties.
privacy.line_27: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, or erase your data. Since all data (customer cards, language settings, logs) is stored locally on your device, you can exercise these rights directly by using the data deletion function in the app or by deleting the app data in your browser settings.
privacy.line_29: We rely on state-of-the-art web technologies to create a secure local environment for your data. By processing data locally, we minimize the risk of data interception during transmission.
privacy.line_31: Personal data is information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. In this app, such data (such as the contents of loyalty cards) is processed strictly locally.
privacy.line_33: We reserve the right to amend this policy if technical processes change. Please check this policy regularly.

errors.modelLoadingTimeout: Model loading timed out after 30 minutes. The model files are very large - please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.generationTimeout: Text generation timed out after 30 minutes. Please try with a shorter prompt or smaller max tokens setting.
